author: tersec
content:
Regarding ACDC comments about 7688 Gloas devnets (https://forkcast.org/calls/acdc/179#t=4337), it's running stably in Kurtosis with Nimbus and Lodestar on alpha.8

I'd also echo <@412614104222531604>'s comment about waiting for this for months now, it's been ready, and if each time, the CL teams say, not ready, and we want the next devnet in `n` weeks, well...
